summary: Frontend testing for TreePine bug fix and cascading geo dropdowns feature. All tests PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: TreePine import added correctly at line 17 in Dashboard.jsx
GeoSelectCI component properly integrated in FarmerPDCPage, AgentVisitePDC, and RegisterFarmerPage
divisionsCI.js data file contains comprehensive Côte d'Ivoire administrative divisions
Cascade logic working correctly: Region -> Département -> Sous-préfecture
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) TreePine bug fixed in Dashboard.jsx Plus tab - Guide Agroforesterie menu item renders correctly, 2) Cascading geo dropdowns working in FarmerPDCPage, AgentVisitePDC, and RegisterFarmerPage with data-testids: geo-region-select, geo-departement-select, geo-sous-prefecture-select (and register-* variants for RegisterFarmerPage), 3) PDC navigation and basic functionality working with existing farmer PDC at 96.2% conformity

tests_executed.name: TreePine Bug Fix - Farmer Dashboard Plus Tab
tests_executed.details: Plus tab loads without 'TreePine is not defined' error. Guide Agroforesterie menu item renders correctly with TreePine icon.

tests_executed.name: FarmerPDCPage Cascading Geo Dropdowns
tests_executed.details: Region, Département, Sous-préfecture dropdowns found with correct data-testids. Cascade working: Haut-Sassandra -> [Daloa, Issia, Vavoua] -> [Bediala, Daloa, Gonaté, Zoukougbeu]

tests_executed.name: RegisterFarmerPage Cascading Geo Dropdowns
tests_executed.details: Region, Département, Sous-préfecture dropdowns found with register-* data-testids. Cascade working correctly.

tests_executed.name: AgentVisitePDC Cascading Geo Dropdowns
tests_executed.details: Region, Département, Sous-préfecture dropdowns found with geo-* data-testids. Cascade working correctly.

tests_executed.name: PDC Regression Test
tests_executed.details: PDC navigation between steps works. Next/Previous buttons functional. Existing farmer PDC loads with 96.2% conformity.
